note: Curated application windows for full-time new-grad AI/ML roles, US. Dates are TYPICAL windows for this cycle, not hard deadlines — big tech mostly uses rolling admissions, so 'opens' matters more than 'closes'. Google is the notable hard ~2-week window. Live open-role counts (from the scraped jobs table) are the ground truth for what's actually posted right now. Refresh yearly / as the cycle shifts. sponsor = historically a reliable H-1B sponsor (verify per-role). aliases are lowercase substrings matched against job.company and recruiter.company.

companies.name: Amazon
companies.notes: Your ex-employer — boomerang/referral path is your single best shot. Rolling; posts early, day-one applications matter. Ping former AWS team for a referral when you apply.

companies.name: Databricks
companies.notes: Opens earliest alongside Amazon. Heavy ML/data-infra focus — strong fit.

companies.name: Anthropic
companies.notes: Explicitly hires 2027-2028 grads; PhD NOT required (needs >=1 internship/substantive AI/ML project — you have AWS + RAG/red-team projects). Maps directly to your profile. Rolling.

companies.name: OpenAI
companies.notes: Full-time roles for 0-3 yrs experience incl. recent grads. Residency is a 6-month program for strong fundamentals without formal ML. Rolling.

companies.name: Microsoft
companies.notes: Primary round Aug-Oct 2026; smaller leftover round Jan-Mar 2027. Apply in the primary round for the full pool. You have ex-AWS contacts who moved here — line up a referral.

companies.name: Apple
companies.notes: Follows Microsoft, opens ~September. Largely rolling.

companies.name: Meta
companies.notes: Opens Sept-Oct. Top H-1B sponsor. You have ex-AWS contacts here — referral helps.

companies.name: Google
companies.notes: WARNING: tight ~2-4 week window in mid-Oct, then closes before most people notice. Check weekly starting September. You have ex-AWS contacts here — get the referral ready BEFORE it opens.

companies.name: NVIDIA
companies.notes: Has a 2027 new-grad track; hiring volume down overall but AI roles up. Rolling.

companies.name: Two Sigma
companies.notes: Quant firms recruit EARLIEST of all (Jul-Sept) with top pay and heavy ML. Rolling.

companies.name: Citadel
companies.notes: Very early, rolling. Citadel Securities + the fund both hire.

companies.name: Jane Street
companies.notes: Rolling, early. Very high bar.

companies.name: Hudson River Trading
companies.program: New Grad — Algo Dev / SWE / ML
companies.notes: Rolling, early.

companies.name: D. E. Shaw
companies.notes: Rolling, early.

companies.name: Uber
companies.notes: You have an ex-AWS contact here — strong referral opportunity. Heavy ML org.

companies.name: Tesla
companies.notes: Rolling. Strong AI/autonomy org.

companies.name: Netflix
companies.notes: Fewer new-grad slots but strong ML. Rolling.

companies.name: Snowflake
companies.notes: Rolling. Data + AI focus.

companies.name: LinkedIn
companies.notes: Microsoft subsidiary; separate new-grad pipeline. Rolling.

companies.name: Salesforce
companies.notes: Futureforce program. Rolling.

companies.name: Adobe
companies.notes: Rolling. Firefly / GenAI org growing.

companies.name: Pinterest
companies.notes: Strong ML/recsys org. Rolling.

companies.name: Qualcomm
companies.notes: On-device AI. Reliable new-grad + sponsorship volume.
